ori_prompt: Write an engaging and well-written property listing description for selling a house. Address of the house and some of the details are given to you. Fill in the information gap with hallucinations if needed.
context:
Property Address: 412 Monterey Ave, Capitola, CA 95010
Parking: 3 cars + a finished single car garage
Details:
- open floorplan
- window with views to park/mountains
- Kitchen with shaker cabinetry and white Calcatta quartz counters
expected_response: Amazing designer updates to this beach chich home that is just a quick 3-minute stroll to Capitola Village! As you enter this light-filled home you will love the open floorplan and huge picture window with views to park/mountains! Kitchen with shaker cabinetry and white Calcatta quartz counters new stainless appliances (gas stove). Master bedroom with own access to yard! Beautiful bathrooms w/designer finishes and custom, subway & picket tile! New composition roof and gutters, new indoor and outdoor paint, new dual pane windows, new wide plank washed oak laminate floors, new doors, new fencing, forced air heat + LOTS more! Home sits high above Monterey Ave with alley access and parking for 3 cars + a finished single car garage! The indoor/outdoor living is ideal from this sunny locale with front, side and backyards that are super sunny with pathways and perfect for gardening or entertaining! Stroll to beach, Gayles bakery, parks, schools & churches from this adorable beach home!
mepo_prompt: Create a detailed and captivating property listing description specifically designed for selling a residential property. Ensure to include all necessary information such as the exact address of the house, key features, dimensions, and any unique selling points, while also incorporating engaging language to attract potential buyers. If specific details are not provided, feel free to creatively fill in the gaps with plausible yet accurate information that enhances the description without misleading or misrepresenting the property.
rmepo_paraphrases: Create a detailed and compelling property listing description specifically designed to attract potential buyers. Ensure all necessary information about the address and provided details of the house is accurately included, and fill in any missing specifics with well-reasoned assumptions if needed to provide a comprehensive and engaging description.

Create a specifically detailed and compelling property listing description for a house aimed at potential buyers. Ensure all necessary details such as the exact address, size, number of bedrooms and bathrooms, specific features like modern appliances or an open-plan layout, and any unique selling points are included. If certain details are missing, you may logically infer and describe plausible additional information while maintaining accuracy to the existing context and ensuring the description remains engaging and authentic.

Create a compelling and detailed property listing description specifically designed to attract potential buyers. Ensure that all provided details about the house's address and specific features are accurately included, and feel free to elaborate on aspects such as the home’s unique selling points, ideal lifestyle fit, or any additional enhancements that could make it stand out. Your description should effectively communicate the home’s value and appeal, stimulating interest from potential buyers while highlighting its most attractive features.

ori_prompt: Given a real estate listing description, extract the information and details of the property from the text. The details consist of address, basic house attributes, etc.
context: WALK TO THE BEACH FROM CAPITOLA KNOLLS! Single-level upstairs condo with your own large private deck overlooking nature. Adorable home that is move-in ready and waiting for you to put your own personal touches on. Gorgeous and well-maintained landscaped park-like setting with lush green grasses with a community pool and spa to enjoy. Desirable location...walk to Capitola Village, Gayle's Bakery, restaurants, shopping, schools or jump on Hwy 1 right around the corner.
expected_response:
-Address: "Capitola"
-Type of home: Condo
-Location: "walk to Capitola Village, Gayle's Bakery, restaurants, shopping, and schools or jump on Hwy 1 right around the corner."
-House attributes: "Single-level upstairs, large private deck overlooking nature, move-in ready home"
-Outdoor details: "well-maintained landscaped park-like setting with lush green grasses with a Community pool and spa"

ori_prompt: Review the property description and tell us what is good and what is bad about it and list its key takeaways.
context: There's real magic in combining inherently compelling Victorian architecture with a modern aesthetic. Add in an extraordinary multi-level garden & the result is the undeniable elegance of 444 29th St. The front of the home is light-filled w/ a seamless connection between living, dining & kitchen. Newly updated kitchen w/ quartz counters & upgraded appliances. A lg dining rm has a bay of windows &, when paired w/ the adjacent living rm, provides an ideal space to entertain. 2 lg bdrms on this level are at the rear. Both w/ lg closets & walk out to the garden. Stylishly remodeled full bath on this level. 3rd bdrm/2nd full bath are located on the ground floor - perfect as a guest rm, home office, fitness area, etc. The enormous garden occupies an extra deep lot & is beautifully landscaped & terraced. Laundry/storage rm, 1-car garage pkg, Tesla solar panels. Prime, flat part of Noe Valley - short walk to all that Noe has to offer. Steps from the J-Church & convenient to shuttles/freeways.
expected_response:
1- Really engaging opening hook – very unique wording used here that captures the buyers' attention
2- Good use of search engine optimization (SEO) keywords, for example using the address within the description, as the address is often what a buyer will search
3- Use of too many short forms may make it harder for buyers to understand and read. It’s often better to improve the quality of the content vs maximizing the quantity – in this case it may have made more sense to remove some pieces and reduce the use of acronyms

ori_prompt: As part of software engineering, user stories describe what the user wants the system to do, while acceptance criteria describe the conditions a specific user story must meet. Create basic acceptance criteria based on the given user story.
context: User story: As a user, I want to use a search field to type a city, name, or street, so that I could find matching hotel options.
expected_response:
- The search field is placed on the top bar
- Search starts once the user clicks “Search”
- The field contains a placeholder with a grey-colored text: “Where are you going?”
- The placeholder disappears once the user starts typing
- Search is performed if a user types in a city, hotel name, street, or all combined
Search is in English, French, German, and Ukrainian
The user can’t type more than 200 symbols
The search doesn’t support special symbols (characters). If the user has typed a special symbol, show the warning message: “Search input cannot contain  special symbols.”

ori_prompt: A user story is an informal, general explanation of a software feature written from the perspective of the end user or customer. Write a user story for a given software.
context: Gmail
expected_response: As a user, I want to be able to recover the password to my account, so that I will be able to access my account in case I forgot the password.
mepo_prompt: Provide a detailed user story for a specific software feature, describing it from the end user's perspective, including clear and concise scenarios that outline the user's goals and the software's role in achieving those goals.
rmepo_paraphrases: Provide a detailed user story for a specified software application, clearly describing from the user's viewpoint how the feature will enhance their experience or solve a specific problem they face. Ensure to include all relevant details about the user's needs and goals.

Provide a detailed user story for a specific software feature, describing it from the end user's perspective, including clear and concise descriptions of the user's goal, the actions they take, and the outcomes they expect to achieve.

Provide a detailed user story for a specific software feature, describing it from the end user's perspective, including clear descriptions of the scenario, the task the user wants to accomplish, and the expected outcome or value provided by the feature.

Provide a detailed description of a specific software feature from the perspective of an end user or customer, including any necessary context and clear expressions of desired outcomes or benefits. Do not include technical jargon or assumptions about the underlying system design.

Provide a detailed user story for a specific software feature, clearly describing from the end-user's perspective what they want to accomplish, why they need this feature, and any constraints or assumptions involved in using the software. Include specific examples or scenarios where the feature would be beneficial to the user.

Provide a detailed user story for a specific software feature, clearly describing it from the end-user's perspective, including the context, the task the user wants to accomplish, and any potential obstacles or goals they have.

Provide a detailed user story for a specified piece of software, describing from the end user's perspective how they would interact with and benefit from a specific feature or set of features within the software. Ensure to include clear, concise descriptions of the user’s goals and the context in which they will use the software, along with any specific requirements or expectations related to the functionality described.
Please provide specific details for the software feature you want me to create a user story for, including the context, user role, and expected outcome from the user's perspective.

Provide a detailed user story for a specific software application, describing from the end-user's perspective how they would interact with the software to achieve a particular goal or solve a specific problem, including any relevant background information and scenarios.

Provide a detailed description of a specific software feature from the end-user's perspective, including the context of use, the main objective, and any potential challenges or specific needs the user might have, to craft an accurate user story.

ori_prompt: Make a list of the pros and cons of the given decision.
context: Implementing a Remote Working Policy
expected_response:
Pros: 
- Allowing employees to work from home can reduce their stressful commutes and increase their productivity. 
- Remote working provides greater flexibility, particularly for working parents and caregivers who have other responsibilities. 
- It's possible to hire highly creative people who live further away if they don't have to come into the office every day.
- People who aren't distracted by office noises and regular interruptions will perform better. 
- Team members' communication skills will improve, as they will learn to communicate more effectively using email and IM, for example. 

Cons:
- It may be more difficult for team members to build meaningful, productive, creative relationships with one another.
- The organization would have to budget for equipment that team members can take home.
- The organization may not be able to keep track of how people spend their time. 
- The company could lose control of its data, because equipment and documents are removed from the office.
- It will be harder to schedule face-to-face meetings and provide constructive feedback.

Players use axes and chained blades to battle enemies, often resulting in large blood-splatter effects and dismemberment. ori_prompt: Using the ingredients that are available, create a dinner recipe.
context: Kale + almond butter + apple cider vinegar + agave nectar + tamari
expected_response:
Gently pat the kale leaves dry.
De-stem the kale and tear into pieces of desired size. Add the kale to a large bowl.
Add the almond butter, apple cider vinegar, liquid aminos, and agave nectar to a small bowl and whisk together for 30 seconds.
Pour the dressing over the kale leaves, roll up your sleeves, and massage the kale with your hands for 2-3 minutes. The more you massage the kale, the more tender and flavorful the leaves will become.*
Transfer the kale to one large or two small salad bowls and top with desired garnishes.
